title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: David Ondrej presents a 30-minute course on Pi Agent, a framework for building real coding agents. The course covers how to master Pi Agent for AI-driven code development.
writeup: This video is a 30-minute course from David Ondrej on Pi Agent, a framework for building coding agents. It walks through how to master Pi Agent for AI-driven code development, touching on AI agents and multi-agent systems. The takeaway is a compact overview of using the framework to construct real coding agents.
